parameters.query:
SELECT t.id AS trip_id, r.origin, r.destination, t.departure_at, t.price,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats s WHERE s.trip_id = t.id AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE') AS available_seats
FROM trips t
JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
WHERE LOWER(r.origin) = LOWER($1)
  AND LOWER(r.destination) = LOWER($2)
  AND t.departure_at::date = $3::date
  AND t.status = 'SCHEDULED'
  AND tenant_slug = $4
ORDER BY t.departure_at;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT seat_number, is_window FROM seats
WHERE trip_id = $1 AND status = 'AVAILABLE'
  AND tenant_slug = $3
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN $2::boolean THEN is_window END) DESC NULLS LAST, seat_number
LIMIT 20;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

WITH locked_seat AS (
  SELECT s.id AS seat_id, t.price
  FROM seats s JOIN trips t ON t.id = s.trip_id
  WHERE s.trip_id = $1 AND s.seat_number = $2 AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE'
  FOR UPDATE OF s SKIP LOCKED
  LIMIT 1
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE seats SET status = 'HELD'
  WHERE id = (SELECT seat_id FROM locked_seat)
  AND tenant_slug = $9
RETURNING id
),
hold_minutes AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN $8 = 'cash' THEN 30 ELSE 10 END AS m )
INSERT INTO bookings (ref, trip_id, seat_id, passenger_name, phone, id_type, id_number, amount, payment_method, status, hold_expires_at)
SELECT $3, $1, ls.seat_id, $4, $5, $6, $7, ls.price,
       $8,
       'HELD',
       NOW() + (SELECT m FROM hold_minutes) * INTERVAL '1 minute'
FROM locked_seat ls
RETURNING ref, amount, hold_expires_at, payment_method;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

UPDATE bookings SET payment_method = $2, alt_payment_phone = CASE WHEN $3 <> phone THEN $3 ELSE alt_payment_phone END
WHERE ref = $1 AND status = 'HELD'
  AND tenant_slug = $4
RETURNING ref, amount, phone, hold_expires_at;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

WITH b AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.amount, b.status, b.seat_id, t.departure_at
  FROM bookings b JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
  WHERE b.ref = $1
),
elig AS (
  SELECT id, amount, status, seat_id,
    CASE WHEN departure_at - NOW() > INTERVAL '2 hour' THEN 'OK'
         WHEN departure_at < NOW() THEN 'NO_SHOW'
         ELSE 'LATE' END AS eligibility
  FROM b
),
upd_book AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW()
  WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM elig WHERE eligibility IN ('OK','LATE') AND status IN ('CONFIRMED','HELD'))
  RETURNING id, seat_id, amount
),
upd_seat AS (
  UPDATE seats SET status = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE id IN (SELECT seat_id FROM upd_book)
  AND tenant_slug = $2
RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT eligibility FROM elig) AS eligibility,
       (SELECT amount FROM elig) AS amount,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM upd_book) AS cancelled;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

INSERT INTO complaints (booking_ref, phone, summary, tenant_slug) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING id;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT t.id AS trip_id, r.origin, r.destination, t.departure_at, t.price,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats s WHERE s.trip_id = t.id AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE') AS available_seats,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats s WHERE s.trip_id = t.id AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND s.is_window = TRUE) AS window_seats
  FROM trips t
  JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
  WHERE LOWER(r.origin) = LOWER($1)
    AND LOWER(r.destination) = LOWER($2)
    AND t.departure_at >= $3::timestamptz
    AND t.status = 'SCHEDULED'
  ORDER BY t.departure_at
) sub
WHERE sub.available_seats >= $5::int
  AND tenant_slug = $6
LIMIT $4::int;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

WITH candidate_trips AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.price, t.departure_at
  FROM trips t
  JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
  WHERE LOWER(r.origin) = LOWER($1)
    AND LOWER(r.destination) = LOWER($2)
    AND t.departure_at >= $3::timestamptz
    AND t.status = 'SCHEDULED'
  ORDER BY t.departure_at
  LIMIT $11::int
),
locked_seat AS (
  SELECT s.id AS seat_id, s.trip_id, ct.price, ct.departure_at, s.seat_number, s.is_window
  FROM candidate_trips ct
  JOIN seats s ON s.trip_id = ct.id
  WHERE s.status = 'AVAILABLE'
  ORDER BY ct.departure_at, (CASE WHEN $12::boolean THEN s.is_window END) DESC NULLS LAST, s.seat_number
  FOR UPDATE OF s SKIP LOCKED
  LIMIT 1
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE seats SET status = 'HELD' WHERE id = (SELECT seat_id FROM locked_seat) RETURNING id
),
hold_minutes AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN $10 = 'cash' THEN 30 ELSE 10 END AS m ),
ins AS (
  INSERT INTO bookings (ref, trip_id, seat_id, passenger_name, phone, id_type, id_number, amount, payment_method, status, hold_expires_at)
  SELECT $4, ls.trip_id, ls.seat_id, $5, $6, $7, $8, ls.price, $10, 'HELD',
         NOW() + (SELECT m FROM hold_minutes) * INTERVAL '1 minute'
  FROM locked_seat ls
  RETURNING ref, trip_id, seat_id, amount, hold_expires_at, payment_method
)
SELECT ins.ref, ins.amount, ins.hold_expires_at, ins.payment_method,
       ls.trip_id, ls.seat_number, ls.is_window, ls.departure_at,
       (SELECT origin FROM routes r JOIN trips t ON t.route_id = r.id WHERE t.id = ls.trip_id) AS origin,
       (SELECT destination FROM routes r JOIN trips t ON t.route_id = r.id WHERE t.id = ls.trip_id) AS destination
FROM ins, locked_seat ls;
  AND tenant_slug = $13

-- /* tenancy:patched */
